metadata.file_name: Elvis Presley - A Little Less Conversation (JXL Radio Edit Remix).flac
metadata.title: A Little Less Conversation (JXL Radio Edit Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:25.03] A little less conversation, a little more action please
[00:29.41] All this aggravation ain't satisfactioning me
[00:33.41] A little more bite and a little less bark
[00:35.48] A little less fight and a little more spark
[00:37.50] Close your mouth and open up your heart and maybe satisfy me
[00:41.05] Satisfy me, baby
[00:44.37] 
[01:00.65] Baby, close your eyes and listen to the music
[01:02.65] Drifting through a summer breeze
[01:04.75] It's a groovy night and I can show you how to use it
[01:06.89] Come along with me and put your mind at ease
[01:08.82] A little less conversation, a little more action please
[01:13.12] All this aggravation ain't satisfactioning me
[01:17.23] A little more bite and a little less bark (ah-ah)
[01:19.48] A little less fight and a little more spark (ah-ah)
[01:21.23] Close your mouth and open up your heart and maybe satisfy me (satisfy me)
[01:25.10] Satisfy me, baby (satisfy me)
[01:27.72] Come on, baby, I'm tired of talking
[01:31.83] Grab your coat and let's start walking
[01:36.18] Come on, come on (come on, come on)
[01:38.37] Come on, come on (come on, come on)
[01:40.25] Come on, come on (come on, come on)
[01:42.49] Don't procrastinate, don't articulate (aah-aah)
[01:44.53] Girl, it's getting late, you just sit 'n' wait around, yeah (aah-aah)
[01:48.67] A little less conversation, a little more action please
[01:52.76] All this aggravation ain't satisfactioning me
[01:56.95] A little more bite and a little less bark (ah-ah)
[01:58.93] A little less fight and a little more spark (ah-ah)
[02:00.95] Close your mouth and open up your heart and maybe satisfy me (satisfy me)
[02:04.44] Satisfy me (satisfy me)
[02:07.43] 
[02:14.20] (Satisfy me)
[02:18.36] (Satisfy me)
[02:21.63]

[02:42.91] Grab your coat and let's start walking
[02:47.08] Come on, come on (come on, come on)
[02:49.15] Come on, come on (come on, come on)
[02:51.11] Come on, come on (come on, come on)

[02:59.67] A little less conversation, a little more action please
